_README: Edit the numbers here, then run: npm run docs:refresh
Any entry with "verify": true renders as VERIFY in the output instead of being
presented as fact. Every figure ships as verify:true until a human confirms it
against a real invoice. A guessed number in a cost doc is worse than no number.
NOTE: this project has no customers, no plan price, and no revenue. The tier /
margin model from the generic template does not apply and was deliberately
removed. This tracks what the experiment COSTS TO RUN.

assumptions.notes: Two scheduled cycles per trading day: 10:00 AM ET decisions and 3:30 PM ET exit-only. Cycle count scales with active portfolios sharing one market-data fetch.

variableCosts.notes: Depends on prompt size (positions + quotes + news + indicators + screener CSV) and output length. Measure from the Anthropic console rather than estimating.

fixedCosts.notes: Believed free tier; rate-limit behaviour observed 2026-07-22 is consistent with that. Confirm.
Paper account; market data tier may carry a cost.
